name: Homestay Murders
overview: A group of strangers get together at Ananya Homestay, surrounded by the mysterious silence of the mountains. When one of them is murdered, they confront each other's secrets and motives and uncover the truth before the killer strikes again

trailers.title: Official Trailer - Homestay Murders | Saurav, Arjun, Sohini, Parno | 12th May | hoichoi
